onboarding.intro: A non-custodial wallet that explains transactions in plain language and warns you about risks.
onboarding.keysNote: Your keys are stored only on this device, encrypted with your password.

add.title: Add a wallet
add.description: A new wallet is independent: its own seed phrase and its own password. Existing wallets stay untouched.

create.title: Vault password
create.passwordHint: The password encrypts the vault on this device (Argon2id + AES-256-GCM in the core) and is required for every unlock.
create.passwordHintAdd: This password applies only to the new wallet — the passwords of other wallets are independent.
create.backupHint: Write down the 12 words in a safe place offline. It is the only way to recover the wallet.
create.neverShare: Never show this phrase to anyone. Support will never ask for it.
create.savedConfirm: I have written down the phrase and understand that losing it means losing my funds.

unlock.title: Welcome back
unlock.note: The password decrypts the vault locally and is never sent anywhere. Each wallet has its own password.

restore.explainText: The password is not stored and cannot be recovered. But the wallet can be restored with its seed phrase: enter the phrase of this wallet and set a new password.
restore.noPhraseWarning: If you do not have the seed phrase, access to this wallet's funds is lost: without the phrase the vault cannot be decrypted.
restore.createNewHint: No phrase? You can create a new wallet with a new phrase and password. This wallet will stay in the list — if the phrase is found later, it can be restored.
restore.phraseHint: Enter the wallet's phrase — 12 or 24 words separated by spaces. The phrase never leaves this device.
restore.phraseHintNamed: Enter the phrase of wallet “{{name}}” — 12 or 24 words separated by spaces. The phrase never leaves this device.
restore.mismatch: The addresses of this phrase do not match this wallet. If it is another phrase of yours, you can add it as a separate new wallet (existing entries stay unchanged).
restore.mismatchNamed: The addresses of this phrase do not match wallet “{{name}}”. If it is another phrase of yours, you can add it as a separate new wallet (existing entries stay unchanged).
restore.newPasswordHint: The new password will re-encrypt this wallet's vault in place of the forgotten one (Argon2id + AES-256-GCM). The name and addresses stay the same.
restore.asNewHint: The phrase will be added as a separate wallet with its own password. Existing wallets stay unchanged.

home.backendDownBalances: Backend is not responding — balances were not refreshed.
home.noAssetsHint: Top up your wallet — open “Receive” to see your addresses and QR code.

send.title: Send
send.feeNote: Fee: “standard” tier from the node's EIP-1559 estimate.

receive.title: Receive
receive.noAccountHint: Unlock the wallet to see your receiving addresses.
receive.chooseNetwork: Choose a network to see the address and QR code for topping up.
receive.evmShared: The address for EVM networks ({{chains}}) is shared.
receive.clipboardError: Clipboard is unavailable — select and copy the address manually.
receive.networkWarning: Send only {{chain}} network assets to this address. Assets from other networks will be lost.
receive.evmSharedDetail: The address is shared across all EVM networks: {{chains}}.
receive.fromWalletHint: Send funds to the address above or scan the QR code in the sending wallet.
receive.fromExchangeHint: Withdraw funds from the exchange to this address. In the withdrawal form pick the {{chain}} network specifically — otherwise the funds will not arrive.
receive.providerHint: The provider opens in a new tab; your address will be filled in automatically.

activity.title: Activity
activity.backendDown: Backend is not responding — history was not loaded.
activity.emptyHint: As soon as you send or receive funds, annotated records will appear here.

txDetail.title: Transaction
txDetail.externalService: Opens the network's block explorer in a new browser tab.

analytics.backendDown: Backend is not responding — analytics were not loaded.
analytics.emptyHint: Fees and transaction stats will appear here once there is activity in the selected period.
analytics.feesChartAria: Bar chart of fees over time

chat.title: AI chat
chat.disclaimer: Answers questions about your activity. Cannot sign transactions.
chat.suggestion1: How much did I spend on fees this month?
chat.suggestion2: Which approvals of mine are active?
chat.streamInterrupted: No answer received: the connection was interrupted. Please send your question again.

approve.noRequestHint: This screen opens when a dApp asks you to sign. There is nothing to review right now.

settings.title: More
settings.removeWarning: Without the seed phrase this wallet cannot be restored. The ciphertext will be deleted from this device forever.
settings.removeWarningLast: This is the last wallet — onboarding will be required afterwards.
settings.savedSeedConfirm: I have saved this wallet's seed phrase
settings.accountMeta: Created from a seed phrase · index {{index}}
settings.languageHint: Defaults to your browser language; a manual choice is saved on this device. Languages without a translation are shown in English for now.
settings.securityNote: The vault is encrypted locally (Argon2id + AES-256-GCM). The seed phrase never leaves the device; the AI chat has no access to transaction signing.
settings.revealSeedWarning: The seed phrase gives full control over all funds of this wallet. Never share it and never enter it on any website — anyone who sees it can take everything.

errorBoundary.title: Something went wrong
errorBoundary.body: The wallet interface crashed. Your keys are safe — the encrypted vault was not touched.

errors.passwordTooShort: The password must contain at least 8 characters.
errors.privateKeyImportSoon: Private key import will be available after the core integration.
errors.phraseWordCount: The seed phrase must contain 12 or 24 words.
errors.invalidMnemonic: Invalid seed phrase: a word is outside the BIP-39 dictionary or the checksum does not match.
errors.phraseOtherWallet: This phrase belongs to a different wallet. Check the words.
errors.backgroundUnresponsive: The background script is not responding. Restart the extension.
errors.walletLimit: You can have at most {{max}} wallets. Remove one to add another.
errors.bitcoinSignSoon: Bitcoin signing will be available after the PSBT integration (BDK).
errors.bitcoinTxSoon: Bitcoin transaction signing will be available after the PSBT integration (BDK).
errors.chainSendSoon: Sending on {{chain}} will be available later — this network's transaction building is still missing in the core.
errors.invalidEvmRecipient: Enter a valid EVM recipient address (0x + 40 hex characters).
errors.amountNotPositive: The amount must be greater than zero.

api.txParamsUnavailable: Failed to fetch transaction parameters: the backend is unavailable ({{url}}). Start the api-server and try again.
api.broadcastUnavailable: Failed to broadcast the transaction: the backend is unavailable ({{url}}). Start the api-server and try again.

history.tx3: Allowed Uniswap to spend your USDC (limited to 500 USDC)
history.tx5: Interacted with the Aerodrome contract: liquidity added
history.tx6: Minted the “Base Camp Badge” NFT (free, gas 0.02 POL)

risk.connect: Connection request only: the dApp will see your public address.
risk.personalSign1: Signing an arbitrary message: make sure the text is understandable.
risk.personalSign2: The dApp domain was not found in trusted lists.
risk.approveUnlimited1: Unlimited approve: the dApp will be able to spend ALL of your tokens of this type.
risk.approveUnlimited2: The contract was created less than 7 days ago and is not verified.
risk.approveUnlimited3: The dApp domain resembles a known phishing template.
risk.unknownCall1: A contract call that could not be fully decoded.
risk.unknownCall2: The simulation shows a balance decrease of an unknown amount.
risk.simpleTransfer: A simple native coin transfer to an address with no risk signals.

explain.connect: The site {{origin}} is asking to connect to your wallet. It will see your address and balance but cannot spend anything without a separate signature.
explain.personalSign: The site {{origin}} is asking you to sign a message. The signature does not spend funds, but it may be used to log in or authorize actions on your behalf.
explain.approveHigh: You are giving {{origin}} permission to spend ALL of your USDC without limits. If the contract is malicious, the funds will be lost.
explain.contractMedium: You are calling a contract function via {{origin}}. According to the simulation your balance will decrease; the exact amount could not be decoded.
explain.transferLow: You are sending 0.01 ETH (≈ $32.50) to 0x7bC4…9aF1. Fee ≈ $1.20.
explain.chainId: A service request for the network identifier.

mock.chatAnswer:
Over the last 30 days you spent about $14.62 on fees: $11.20 on Ethereum, $2.10 on Bitcoin, $0.90 on Polygon and $0.42 on Solana. The most expensive was an approve transaction for Uniswap ($4.80). Tip: on Ethereum, fees at night (UTC) are usually 30–50% lower. 

_(This is a mock answer: the /v1/chat backend is unavailable.)_
